description: Aggregate non-performing loan (NPL) ratio across IDC direct lending portfolio stands at 18.5%, significantly above the 10% internal threshold. Five portfolio companies with combined exposure of ZMW 420,000,000 are in technical default.
mitigationPlan: Engage distressed portfolio companies with restructuring plans; increase loan loss provisioning to 25% of NPL exposure; consider debt-equity swaps for strategically important entities.

description: Delays in implementing the SOE privatisation programme per MoF-DIR-2024-005, driven by political economy constraints and lack of strategic investors, are reducing IDC portfolio returns and increasing GRZ fiscal burden.
mitigationPlan: Re-engage Ministry of Finance and Cabinet on privatisation timeline; develop alternative structures where full divestiture is not feasible; improve SOE performance to attract investors.

description: ZCCM-IH primary income is dividends from copper and cobalt mining portfolio companies. LME copper price volatility directly impacts dividend income and NAV per share. A USD 500/t decline in copper price reduces estimated annual dividend income by approximately ZMW 180,000,000.
mitigationPlan: Maintain diversified portfolio across copper, cobalt, and emerald commodities; implement hedging strategy review annually; maintain minimum ZMW 600M liquidity reserve.

description: ZCCM-IH has oversight responsibility for 14 tailings storage facilities across portfolio mines. Failure of a tailings dam could cause catastrophic environmental damage, loss of life, and mine closure.
mitigationPlan: Implement GISTM-compliant tailings management framework; conduct annual independent dam safety reviews; establish emergency response plans for all TSFs.

description: Prolonged drought conditions linked to El Nino climate cycle have reduced Kariba Dam water levels to critically low levels, threatening capacity of the 1,080 MW Kafue Gorge and 600 MW Kariba North hydropower stations which provide over 85% of national generation capacity.
mitigationPlan: Accelerate solar IPP procurement to diversify generation mix; negotiate emergency power imports from Mozambique (HCB) and Eskom; implement structured load management programme.

description: ZESCO tariff levels remain significantly below cost-reflective levels, creating a structural revenue deficit of approximately ZMW 780,000,000 per annum. Continued below-cost-recovery tariffs threaten long-term financial viability.
mitigationPlan: Progress ERB tariff review application; engage Ministry of Energy for policy support; implement cost reduction measures to partially close gap pending tariff approval.

description: Mainline track condition on the Livingstone-Kitwe corridor is severely deteriorated with approximately 340 km (32%) of track classified as Category 3 or 4, requiring speed restrictions or complete suspension.
mitigationPlan: Implement 3-year track rehabilitation plan per MoT-DIR-2024-004 with minimum ZMW 1,200,000,000 capital investment; accelerate Phase 1 (Livingstone-Mazabuka) rehabilitation.

description: FY2024 revenue of ZMW 420,000,000 represents a shortfall of 31% against budget, driven by poor service reliability deterring freight customers who divert to road haulage. Operating deficit of ZMW 260,000,000 requires GRZ subsidy.
mitigationPlan: Implement service reliability recovery plan; negotiate long-term freight contracts with Copperbelt mining companies; secure GRZ operating subsidy in FY2025 budget.

description: ZANACO non-performing loan (NPL) ratio rose to 11.2% in Q3 2024, exceeding the BoZ regulatory threshold of 10%. Increased NPLs concentrated in SME lending and agriculture portfolio segments affected by drought and ZMW depreciation.
mitigationPlan: Strengthen credit underwriting standards; intensify collection efforts on delinquent accounts; increase IFRS 9 Stage 2 provisioning; submit NPL reduction plan to BoZ.

description: Artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) gold supply chain faces risks of smuggling and under-declaration of gold volumes, reducing Zambia Gold's procurement volumes and government royalty revenues.
mitigationPlan: Expand gold buying centre network to underserved mining districts; implement digital gold tracking system; engage Zambia Police and ZRA on anti-smuggling enforcement.
